name: subagent: review-types.md frontmatter contains all §2.3 fields (name, model, prompt_id, prompt_version, model_rationale, eval_dataset, prompt_migration_status)
command: for k in name model prompt_id prompt_version model_rationale eval_dataset prompt_migration_status; do grep -E "^$k:" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/review-types.md" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $k missing" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
